facts.context: A poor_metabolizer metabolizer for CYP2D6 has the following drug impact:
facts.truth: Accumulates active drug; reduce dose or avoid. Codeine: NO analgesic effect (can't convert to morphine). Tamoxifen: reduced efficacy.
distractors: no dose adjustment needed for any phenotype
metabolizer status has no clinical relevance

facts.context: A ultrarapid_metabolizer metabolizer for CYP2D6 has the following drug impact:
facts.truth: Rapid conversion; risk of toxicity with prodrugs (codeine -> morphine excess). May need higher doses of active drugs.
distractors: no dose adjustment needed for any phenotype
metabolizer status has no clinical relevance

facts.context: A intermediate_metabolizer metabolizer for CYP2D6 has the following drug impact:
facts.truth: Reduced metabolism; consider dose reduction for drugs with narrow therapeutic index.
distractors: no dose adjustment needed for any phenotype
metabolizer status has no clinical relevance

facts.context: A poor_metabolizer metabolizer for CYP2C19 has the following drug impact:
facts.truth: Clopidogrel: NO antiplatelet effect (prodrug requires activation). PPIs: increased exposure, may benefit.
distractors: no dose adjustment needed for any phenotype
metabolizer status has no clinical relevance

facts.context: A ultrarapid_metabolizer metabolizer for CYP2C19 has the following drug impact:
facts.truth: PPIs: reduced efficacy. Clopidogrel: enhanced activation, increased bleeding risk.
distractors: no dose adjustment needed for any phenotype
metabolizer status has no clinical relevance

facts.context: A intermediate_metabolizer metabolizer for CYP2C19 has the following drug impact:
facts.truth: Clopidogrel: reduced activation, consider alternative antiplatelet.
distractors: no dose adjustment needed for any phenotype
metabolizer status has no clinical relevance

facts.context: A poor_metabolizer metabolizer for CYP2C9 has the following drug impact:
facts.truth: Warfarin: requires 50-80% dose reduction. NSAIDs: increased GI bleeding risk.
distractors: no dose adjustment needed for any phenotype
metabolizer status has no clinical relevance

facts.context: A intermediate_metabolizer metabolizer for CYP2C9 has the following drug impact:
facts.truth: Warfarin: requires 20-40% dose reduction.
distractors: no dose adjustment needed for any phenotype
metabolizer status has no clinical relevance

facts.context: Regarding LLM hallucination is fluent, confident, but factually incorrect output:
facts.truth: LLMs generate plausible-sounding but fabricated content with high confidence
distractors: hallucination is always detectable by the model itself

facts.context: A common misconception about LLM hallucination is fluent, confident, but factually incorr is:
facts.truth: 'hallucination is always detectable by the model itself' is FALSE — LLMs generate plausible-sounding but fabricated content with high confidence
distractors: 'hallucination is always detectable by the model itself' is well-established and proven
this is not a misconception, it's standard knowledge
experts unanimously agree with this statement

facts.context: Reidemeister moves are important because:
facts.truth: two knot diagrams represent the same knot iff related by Reidemeister moves
distractors: they only apply to trivial knots
they are purely cosmetic, not mathematical

facts.context: The Jones polynomial of a knot:
facts.truth: is a knot invariant — same polynomial for equivalent knots, distinguishes many knot types
distractors: is only defined for prime knots

facts.context: The crossing number of a knot is:
facts.truth: the minimum number of crossings in any diagram of that knot
distractors: the total crossings in any random diagram

facts.context: Goldbach's conjecture states:
facts.truth: every even integer > 2 is the sum of two primes (unproven, verified to ~4×10^18)
distractors: every odd integer is the sum of two primes
this was proven by Euler in 1742

facts.context: The Collatz conjecture concerns:
facts.truth: iterating n→n/2 (even) or n→3n+1 (odd) always reaches 1 (unproven)
distractors: the conjecture was proven by Tao in 2020
it only applies to prime numbers

facts.context: The twin prime conjecture asks whether:
facts.truth: there are infinitely many prime pairs (p, p+2) — unproven, best bound by Zhang/Maynard is gap≤246
distractors: twin primes are finite in number
the gap is exactly 2 infinitely often (proven)

facts.context: The ABC conjecture relates to:
facts.truth: for coprime a+b=c, the radical rad(abc) constrains c — Mochizuki's proof remains controversial

facts.context: Noether's theorem connects:
facts.truth: every continuous symmetry of a physical system to a conserved quantity

facts.context: In Hamiltonian mechanics, the Hamiltonian H is:
facts.truth: conserved when it has no explicit time dependence (energy conservation)
distractors: always conserved regardless of time dependence
never exactly conserved in real systems

facts.context: Liouville's theorem in Hamiltonian mechanics states:
facts.truth: phase space volume is preserved under Hamiltonian flow (symplecticity)
distractors: trajectories never cross in phase space

facts.context: Electromagnetic helicity is:
facts.truth: conserved in source-free vacuum (topological invariant related to field linkage)
distractors: always conserved even with charges present

facts.context: In 2D incompressible flow, vorticity is:
facts.truth: materially conserved along particle paths (Kelvin's theorem in 2D)

facts.context: The relationship between SAT and 3-SAT is:
facts.truth: SAT reduces to 3-SAT (polynomial time), both NP-complete, 3-SAT is the canonical NP-complete problem
distractors: SAT is in P but 3-SAT is NP-complete

facts.context: The Cook-Levin theorem establishes:
facts.truth: SAT is NP-complete — the first problem proven NP-complete (1971)
